title: Blades of Pride 01: Transgender Jian
description:
This is a resource pack that changes the netherite sword texture to be something a little bit more prideful! 

Happy pride!
body:
Howdy! This is a pretty simple resource pack, all it does is retexture the netherite sword to have a model more consistent with a chinese Jian, and to have a trangender pride flag themed color scheme! 

I based the texture on the jian a double edged chinese straight sword, I fond it on the wikipedia page for swords and I thought it looked the most interesting at the time, I really like the guard!

If you like this texture pack please consider buying me a tea on Ko-Fi!
